mapper.select:
SELECT id, product_code, product_name, specification, unit, category, sale_price, custom_fields_json, remark, status, created_time, updated_time FROM product
product_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{productCode}, '%')
AND
product_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{productName}, '%')
ORDER BY id ASC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM product
product_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{productCode}, '%')
AND
product_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{productName}, '%')

SELECT id, product_code, product_name, specification, unit, category, sale_price, custom_fields_json, remark, status, created_time, updated_time FROM product
product_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{productCode}, '%')
AND
product_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{productName}, '%')
ORDER BY id ASC

SELECT id, product_code, product_name, specification, unit, category, sale_price, custom_fields_json, remark, status, created_time, updated_time FROM product WHERE product_code = #{productCode} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO product ( product_code, product_name, specification, unit, category, sale_price, custom_fields_json, remark, status ) VALUES ( #{productCode}, #{productName}, #{specification}, #{unit}, #{category}, #{salePrice}, #{customFieldsJson}, #{remark}, #{status} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, product_code, product_name, specification, unit, category, sale_price, custom_fields_json, remark, status, created_time, updated_time FROM product WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, product_code, product_name, specification, unit, category, sale_price, custom_fields_json, remark, status, created_time, updated_time FROM product WHERE product_name = #{productName} AND specification = #{specification} AND unit = #{unit} LIMIT 1

SELECT id, product_code, product_name, specification, unit, category, sale_price, custom_fields_json, remark, status, created_time, updated_time FROM product WHERE product_name = #{productName} AND specification = #{specification} LIMIT 1

SELECT id, product_code, product_name, specification, unit, category, sale_price, custom_fields_json, remark, status, created_time, updated_time FROM product WHERE product_name = #{productName} LIMIT 1

SELECT id, product_code, product_name, specification, unit, category, sale_price, custom_fields_json, remark, status, created_time, updated_time FROM product WHERE product_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{productName}, '%') OR #{productName} LIKE CONCAT('%', product_name, '%') ORDER BY id ASC

SELECT id, product_code, product_name, specification, unit, category, sale_price, custom_fields_json, remark, status, created_time, updated_time FROM product WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY id ASC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE product SET product_code = #{productCode}, product_name = #{productName}, specification = #{specification}, unit = #{unit}, category = #{category}, sale_price = #{salePrice}, custom_fields_json = #{customFieldsJson}, remark = #{remark}, status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
